title: An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses of the Virgin Islands Career and Technical Education Board from the General Fund of the Treasury
text:
ACTNO.889 1
BILL NO. 35-0343
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses ofthe Virgin Islands Career and
Technical Education Board from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of the Government ofthe
Virgin Islands during the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enactedby the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sum, or so much ofit as may be necessary, is appropriated
from the General Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands for operating
expenses, including maintenance, supplies, machinery and equipment and other purposes of
the Virgin Islands Board of Career and Technical Education for the fiscal year October 1,
2024, through September 30, 2025.
0100 GENERAL FUND FY 2025
430 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAREER AND TECHNICAL EDUCATION BOARD
VIRGIN ISLANDS CAREER AND TECHNICAL EDUCATION BOARD $634,681
JAMES A. PETERSEN SCHOLARSHIP $ 20,000
ALBERT RAGSTER SCHOLARSHIP $ 35,000
TOTAL 430 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAREER AND TECHNICAL $ 689,681
TOTAL 0100 GENERAL FUND $689,681

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 3day of
September, A.D., 2024.
Novelle E. Francis, )iE
President
Secretary
ri.
